info.name: Cart Checkout + Mock Payment System
info.description: Postman collection for the CodeQuests Cart Checkout + Mock Payment System. Covers the full happy path, payment failure and retry, duplicate webhook handling, opposite webhook handling, checkout/payment idempotency, cart modification, and validation edge cases.

request.description: Returns the seeded products. Use one of the product IDs in later cart requests.

item.name: 01 - Happy Path Full Flow
item.description: Required Flow 1: Create cart, add items, checkout, start payment, provider confirms, order becomes PAID.

request.description: Creates an order, locks the cart, subtracts stock once, and stores unitPrice snapshot in order items.
Should return the same existing order and must not subtract stock again.
Should return the same PENDING payment and not create another active payment.

exec: pm.test('Payment start is idempotent while pending', function () {

request.description: Mock provider calls POST /payments/webhook over HTTP.

exec: pm.test('Payment confirmed and order paid', function () {

item.name: 02 - Required Flow: Payment Failure Then Retry Success
item.description: Required Flow 2: Start payment, provider sends FAILED, order becomes PAYMENT_FAILED, start payment again, provider confirms, order becomes PAID.

item.name: 02.01 - Create Cart For Failure Retry Flow

exec: pm.test('Retry payment started as new payment', function () {

item.name: 03 - Required Flow: Duplicate Webhook Handling
item.description: Required Flow 3: Same webhook may arrive twice. System must remain correct with no duplicate transition or corrupted state.

item.name: 03.01 - Duplicate CONFIRMED Webhook For Existing Paid Payment

exec: pm.test('Duplicate confirmed webhook ignored safely', function () {

item.name: 03.02 - Opposite FAILED Webhook After CONFIRMED Is Ignored

exec: pm.test('Opposite webhook ignored after final status', function () {

item.name: 03.03 - CONFIRMED Webhook After FAILED Payment Is Ignored

exec: pm.test('Failed payment cannot later become confirmed', function () {

item.name: 04 - Cart Modification And Validation Edge Cases
04.01 - Create Cart For Remove Item Flow
04.03 - Update Quantity To Zero Removes Item

exec: pm.test('Item removed by quantity zero', function () {

item.name: 04.05 - Add More Than Available Stock Returns 400
05 - Direct Webhook API Checks
item.description: These use the webhook endpoint directly. Useful for demonstrating the actual business-critical endpoint separately from the mock provider wrapper.

exec: pm.test('Direct duplicate webhook ignored safely', function () {
